privileged_info_summary: SPY (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) is a real, widely-traded financial instrument tracked on NYSE Arca since 1993, currently trading at approximately $672 as of March 2026. The task configures a fixed price axis (not automatic/adaptive scaling) on a NinjaTrader 8 chart with minimum value 400 and maximum value 500. These axis values represent historical configuration points; SPY currently trades above the configured maximum, indicating the min/max values reflect a historical price range rather than current market conditions. The task uses NinjaTrader's built-in historical SPY data (OHLCV format) imported from text files during environment setup.
